content:
Implementation complete:
- Rewrote document-completion skill: 3 doc types (functional/technical/decisions), parent nesting enforced, solution log removed
- Updated CLAUDE.md workflow step 5 and definition of done
- Updated require-docs.sh hook to match new doc type markers
- Synced all templates

Documented in wiki:
- Functional: functional-wiki-docs (how the new doc system works)
- Decision: decisions (why we dropped solution logs)
